body_transformation: The rounded head now bears a translucent violet skin revealing swirling internal energy currents, while the pointed ears remain structurally intact but appear as wispy, semi-transparent outlines. The robust body silhouette maintains its quadruped stance, but the orange skin texture transforms into a deep ebony black with faint crimson mist swirling beneath the surface. Wing membranes extend from the shoulders as tattered, semi-transparent sheets of pale silver, their edges dissolving into thin air. The curled spiral tail tip dissolves into shadowy vapour, with the tip replaced by a swirling mist vortex that pulses with ghostly energy.
signature_feature: Tail tip: swirling mist vortex with crimson energy pulses and dissolving shadowy edges.
